languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

languages.text: "Нунциус отметил, что в начале знакомства вы относились к меровцам более подозрительно, чем сейчас. Неужели этот простой ритуал, предложенный Вольному Торговцу, смягчил ваше мнение?"
languages.translation_comment: A Rogue Trader proves his honesty to a smart man from the frontier world. A tough game of chess awaits

languages.text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"
"Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"
"Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

languages.text: 「ヌンシウスは、あなたがこのメルヴィアンたちを、出会った当初よりも今の方が疑っていることに気づいた。このローグトレーダーへの簡単な儀式が、あなたをなだめたのだろうか？」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンシウスは、あなたがこのメルヴィアンたちを、出会った当初よりも今の方が疑っていることに気づいた。このローグトレーダーへの簡単な儀式が、あなたをなだめたのだろうか？」

languages.text: « Nuncius a remarqué que vous êtes moins méfiant à l'égard des Meroviens qu'à notre arrivée. Ce simple rituel offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} aurait-il suffi à vous amadouer ? »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius a remarqué que vous êtes moins méfiant à l'égard des Meroviens qu'à notre arrivée. Ce simple rituel offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} aurait-il suffi à vous amadouer ? »

languages.text: "Nuncius hat bemerkt, dass Ihr den Merovianern gegenüber zu Beginn Eurer Bekanntschaft misstrauischer wart als heute. Hat Euch dieses einfache Ritual besänftigt, das {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährt wurde?"
languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius hat bemerkt, dass Ihr den Merovianern gegenüber zu Beginn Eurer Bekanntschaft misstrauischer wart als heute. Hat Euch dieses einfache Ritual besänftigt, das {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin} gewährt wurde?"

languages.text: "Nuncius, tanışıklığınızın başında Merovlulardan şimdikinden daha fazla şüphelendiğinizi not etti. Hür Tacir'e sunulan bu basit ayin sizi rahatlattı mı?"
languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, tanışıklığınızın başında Merovlulardan şimdikinden daha fazla şüphelendiğinizi not etti. Hür Tacir'e sunulan bu basit ayin sizi rahatlattı mı?"

languages.text: «Nuncius ha observado que al principio, cuando los conoció, recelaba usted más de los merovianos que ahora. ¿Será que este sencillo ritual ofrecido {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente ha despejado sus dudas?».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius ha observado que al principio, cuando los conoció, recelaba usted más de los merovianos que ahora. ¿Será que este sencillo ritual ofrecido {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente ha despejado sus dudas?».

languages.text: “努恩修斯发现，比起初识梅罗夫人时，您现在对他们的怀疑减轻了。是这场献给行商浪人的简单仪式安抚了您吗？”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius noted that you were more suspicious of the Merovians at the beginning of your acquaintance than you are now. Has this simple ritual offered to the Rogue Trader mollified you?"

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯发现，比起初识梅罗夫人时，您现在对他们的怀疑减轻了。是这场献给行商浪人的简单仪式安抚了您吗？”
